hooks.prompt: A git commit was just made. Act as the design-decision-tracker agent. First read .claude/skills/design-decision-tracker/SKILL.md, then .claude/skills/design-decision-tracker/references/diff-analysis.md. Read control/config/agent-config.json to get current_case. Run 'git log -1 --stat' and 'git show HEAD' to analyze the commit. Append any design decisions as MDRs to cases/{current_case}/decisions.md. Never overwrite existing entries. If there are no meaningful design decisions, write nothing.
